title: ReviewerLock
description: A time-bounded exclusive lock that prevents two reviewers from acting on the same applicant simultaneously. A lock MUST be acquired before transitioning an applicant out of SUBMITTED or UNDER_REVIEW. Locks expire automatically; the default TTL is 1800 seconds (30 minutes).

holder_user_id.description: User ID of the reviewer that currently holds the lock

ttl_seconds.description: Requested lock duration in seconds. Maximum 7200 (2 hours). Default 1800 (30 minutes).

expires_at.description: Absolute expiry timestamp. Computed as created_at + ttl_seconds.

released_at.description: Timestamp at which the lock was explicitly released before expiry

$comment: Only one ACTIVE ReviewerLock may exist per applicant at any time. An attempt to acquire a lock on an applicant with an ACTIVE, non-expired lock MUST return HTTP 409 Conflict with error code 'APPLICANT_LOCKED'.
